info.name: Notexa API - Complete Backend Collection
info.description:
Complete Postman collection generated from the current Laravel backend routes.

Default local base URL: http://127.0.0.1:8000/api
Production API example: https://app.notexa.cloud/api

Auth: Sanctum Bearer token. Use Login with Email/Login with Username to auto-save {{token}}, and Login as Admin to auto-save {{admin_token}}.

Removed: subscription, premium, upgrade, billing, payment gateway, archive, personal browser AI workspace, and folder APIs are not included because they are not part of the current backend.

Email verification: if enabled in Admin Settings, register/resend sends a 6-digit SMTP code and verify-code returns a token.
Forgot password: forgot-password sends a 6-digit SMTP code and reset-password applies it.

AI endpoints use backend/admin configured providers only. OpenAI-compatible, Gemini, and DeepSeek settings are managed through Admin Settings. OCR uses the Laravel Tesseract package and works separately from AI settings.

Files use local storage by default unless admin settings enable Cloudflare R2. Upload is documented with the JSON/base64 PUT payload used by the frontend, plus legacy multipart POST.

Collaboration uses note share codes for link access plus /presence heartbeat endpoints for online/joined/typing status.

Admin credential helper variables are included for local seeded installs: {{admin_login}} / {{admin_password}}.

request.description: Creates a user. If email verification is enabled, no token is returned until /email/verify-code succeeds.
Login accepts email or username in the login field. This request uses {{email}} and saves the returned Sanctum token into {{token}}.
Login with a username and password. Saves the returned Sanctum token into {{token}}.
Use the returned token as {{admin_token}} for Admin endpoints. Admin login may be an email or username.
Sends a 6-digit reset code by SMTP when SMTP is configured.
Sends a new 6-digit verification code when email verification is enabled.
Verifies email and returns an auth token.
Returns public profile card data for an active username. @ prefix is allowed.
Use the signed URL returned by /files/{file}/download. This route requires a valid expires/signature pair.
Use the signed URL returned by /files/{file}/preview. This route requires a valid expires/signature pair.
Returns current user and stats. Also self-heals legacy storage limit to 1 GB.
Marks today as completed and updates streak_count.

item.name: Get Single Note with Collaboration Token

request.description: If the token matches the note share code, backend grants edit access to the logged-in opener.
Shows version_number, editor user, change_summary, word_count, and restorable version content.
Returns active collaborators and typing state. Only call while collaboration mode is active.
Send every few seconds while editing. is_typing true shows live writing indicator.
Summarizes the note using admin-configured backend AI provider.

item.name: AI Query / Writer / Translation / Quiz Prompt

request.description: General backend AI endpoint used by writer, grammar/translation, flashcards, dictionary, and similar frontend tools.
Extracts text from an uploaded image using the Laravel Tesseract OCR package. This endpoint is not controlled by ai_enabled and does not use AI provider keys.

item.name: OCR Image - Legacy AI OCR Path

request.description: Backward-compatible alias for /notes/{note}/ocr. Uses package OCR, not AI.
Owner only. Target must be an accepted friend.
Includes is_online based on recent Sanctum token activity.
Minimum query length is 2. Returns relationship and online status.
Returns files owned by the current user. Folder APIs are removed/not used.
Preferred frontend upload format. note_id is optional. Max upload size is 50 MB. Storage limit defaults to 1 GB per user.
Legacy multipart upload. Use JSON/base64 when host PHP temp buffering is restricted.
Returns a temporary/signed download_url.
Returns preview_url for PDF, text/code, and safe images only.
Owner only. Target must be an accepted friend.
Admin accounts cannot be deactivated. storage_limit is bytes; 1073741824 = 1 GB.
Admin users cannot be deleted.
Optional group examples: general, smtp, storage, ai, legal.

item.name: Admin Update AI Settings - DeepSeek V4

request.description: Supported DeepSeek model examples: deepseek-v4-flash, deepseek-v4-pro. Deprecated legacy aliases are not used in the frontend editor.

item.name: Admin Update AI Settings - OpenAI Compatible
Admin Forbidden Check With User Token

request.description: Should return 403 for non-admin users.
